contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Governors explainer + whitepaper formula fix + Alchemist hero crop
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/105
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/107
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/108
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/112
  
  Details:
  Governors-on-members + whitepaper accuracy + Alchemist hero crop:
  
  1. Added a "What governors can do" explainer block above the Governors grid on /members.html. Names the selection mechanism (system-chosen by formula on the Main Ledger Governors tab), the rotation cadence, and surfaces the whitepaper's Privileges + Duties lists plus the two governor-only DApp surfaces (governor_permissions.html, governor_contributor_admin.html). Styled to match the existing CV-narrative left-rule aesthetic.
  
  2. Caught a stale fact on prod. Initial copy lifted the whitepaper's "trailing 90 days" framing. Read the actual formula on the Governors tab via Sheets API — the window is 180 days, the ranking metric is sum of TDG issued (col G / Col7), and two passive treasury-flow contribution types are explicitly excluded so moving USDT in/out cannot game governor seats. The formula recomputes daily as the trailing window slides, so the roster is technically continuous; equinoxes / solstices are the social acknowledgment moments, not the technical rotation event. Updated members.html copy to reflect the actual formula.
  
  3. Same correction shipped to the whitepaper §Governors so the two surfaces don't contradict each other. (Two other "90 days" references in the whitepaper concern guild-boot order and Town Hall entry; flagged but not changed since those are social rules without a sheet formula to verify against.)
  
  4. Hero crop fix on beta.agroverse.shop/partners/the-alchemist/ — switched background-position from center/center to center/top so the subject's head isn't clipped by cover-mode scaling.
  
  5. Per the beta→prod fork convention, ran `gh repo sync TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_prod --source TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta` after each beta merge so the changes appear on truesight.me.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
